nodes.label: Hero Image: Isometric layered rounded squares with purple glow
nodes.norm_label: hero image: isometric layered rounded squares with purple glow

nodes.label: 3-Tier Separation
nodes.rationale: Ensures 60FPS performance and prevents complex logic from bleeding into UI components.

nodes.label: UI Aesthetics Constraints
nodes.rationale: Darwin's Canvas relies on a warm, playful, and distinctly hand-crafted aesthetic. Strict constraints prevent regression into generic corporate designs.

nodes.label: Carrying Capacity
nodes.rationale: Explicitly capped populations to avoid total ecosystem collapse and mass starvation events.

nodes.label: Senescence
nodes.rationale: Prevents the Immortal God Problem by severely penalizing creature stats and eventually killing them past their max age.
